title: Foxxz Addons
body:
![LOGO-MAIN](https://i.ibb.co/GGxvYc2/mod-logo.png)
**_Foxxz Addons_** adds new items and blocks that slot right into your world – no clutter, just stuff you’ll actually want to use, plus some fun extras. It also includes vanilla+ recipes and small **QoL** changes to make the overall game flow better in both lightweight and large modpacks.

 

### Some of the Features this Mod includes

(list updated regularly for latest release)

### Materials - Steel, Krodium, Vaunt – clear upgrade paths for tools & armor. - Electrum – tech material for Solar Panels, batteries, and more. - Nether ore variants – Iron, Lapis, and Redstone ore.

### Food & Drinks - Craftable foods – muffins, pies, donuts, glazed apples, juices. - New crops – plant 7 berries/fruits and harvest your own supply.

### Storage - Upgradeable barrels – mineral‑tiered upgrades; more storage the higher the tier. - Portable barrel – extra space on the go. - Energy units – simple FE‑Storage; pick up and re‑place without losing stored energy.

### Units (Utility) - Place a unit – choose an effect-card. - Upgradeable – level up units with an upgrade-card.

### Energy Generation - Solar Panels – simple daytime power. - Coal Burners – reliable fuel power.

### Utility Machines - Water Generator – requires FE; can be collected with buckets. - Lava Generator – requires FE; can be collected with buckets. - Crusher – crushes items with the "Crushable" tag into processed outputs.

### Mystical Books - Mixed behavior – some books use cooldowns, others have toggleable effects. - 10+ different Book‑Types with unique effect‑sets, useful across many scenarios.

### XP Sources - New XP‑Ore – rare XP source found in the Nether. - Enchant "XP Criticals" – small XP on critical hits.

### Config - Most features have Config-entries for better customization. - Singleplayer – ".../config" - Multiplayer/Server – ".../world/serverconfig"

 

If you find any Bugs / Glitches / Crashes please let me know!

** The version number in the Name of the RELEASE is NOT the Minecraft version // Foxxz Addons 1.19.2 is NOT for 1.19.2, look carefully at the GAME-VERSION!!
